News Reports

Current Operations

    Other Operations

    Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • NYT refutes Trump's claim as US missile footprints found in Iran school strike Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- A body of evidence collected by The New York Times, including newly released satellite images, social media posts, as well as verified videos, shows that the elementary school building hit in southern Iran on February 28 was severely damaged by a precision strike, as opposed by President Donald Trump's claim.
  • US service member dies from injuries sustained in Iran's attack on Saudi Arabia, death toll rises to 7 Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 09 Mar 2026 -- A US service member has succumbed to injuries sustained during an Iranian attack on US troops in Saudi Arabia on March 1, bringing the death toll of US service members to seven, US Central Command (CENTCOM) announced Sunday.
  • 7th U.S. service member killed in U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran: command People's Daily 09 Mar 2026 -- U.S. Central Command said on Sunday that the seventh U.S. service member has been killed amid the strikes against Iran, which the United States and Israel launched on Feb. 28.

  • Iran launches wave 33 of True Promise 4 op. with Kheibar Shekan missiles Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps has announced wave 33 of Operation True Promise 4, utilizing a large salvo of solid-fuel Kheibar Shekan ballistic missiles equipped with one-ton warheads.
  • True Promise 4: Iran and resistance axis ops. against US-Israeli assets on Mar. 9 Press TV 09 Mar 2026
  • IRGC Navy political deputy: We have 2 'defining' weeks ahead Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- The political deputy of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Navy says Iran's military might and the nation's steadfastness have so far thwarted the plot of the arrogant powers, and that the upcoming weeks of the war will be "defining."
  • No security in Strait of Hormuz amid US-Israeli war on Iran: Top security official Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- Iran's top security official has warned that there will be no security in the strategic Strait of Hormuz as long as the illegal US-Israeli aggression against the Islamic Republic continues.
  • Iran's Army launches drone strikes on Israeli-occupied lands, US bases in Kuwait Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- The Army of the Islamic Republic of Iran has announced new drone strikes against US and Israeli targets in retaliation for the illegal aggression they are waging against the country.
  • Iran says US only tries to protect Israel, does not care about regional countries Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei says the security of regional states does not matter to the United States as it only makes utmost efforts to protect the Israeli regime.
  • US missiles launched from residential areas of neighboring countries: Tehran Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman says US uses residential areas of neighboring countries to launch missile strikes against Iran, jeopardizing regional security.
  • Pezeshkian: Nakhchivan aerial bombardment not linked to Iran, investigation underway Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian has reiterated that the recent aerial bombardment in Nakhchivan is not linked to Iran.
  • US, Israeli targets struck in mass IRGC missile, drone strikes Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- The IRGC conducts fresh mass missile and drone strikes against regional American bases and Israeli sites in the occupied territories.
  • Iran Marks Mojtaba Khamenei Selection With Strikes Against Israel, Gulf States RFE/RL 09 Mar 2026 -- Iran marked the first hours after the naming of Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader by launching missiles and drones at Israel and Gulf Arab states, who have begun expressing increasing anger over Tehran's retaliatory strikes.

  • Trump Says Iran Campaign To End 'Very Soon,' Disappointed In Choice Of Khamenei's Son RFE/RL 09 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said the military operation launched against Iran last month will end "very soon" and vowed to hit the country "much, much harder" if it blocks oil supplies in the Middle East.
  • Ending Iran War Will Be 'Mutual' Decision with Netanyahu — Trump Sputnik 09 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said that the decision to end the operation against Iran would be made jointly with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.
  • Shaheen, Schatz, Murray, Reed, Warner, Coons Statement on Iran School Strike US Senate Foreign Relations Committee 09 Mar 2026 -- Today, U.S. Senators Jeanne Shaheen (D-NH), Ranking Member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, Brian Schatz (D-HI), Ranking Member of the Senate Appropriations Committee Subcommittee on State and Foreign Operations, Patty Murray (D-WA), Vice Chair of the Senate Appropriations Committee, Jack Reed (D-RI), Ranking Member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, Mark Warner (D-VA), Vice Chairman of the Senate Intelligence Committee, and Chris Coons (D-DE), Ranking Member of the Senate Appropriations Committee Subcommittee on Defense, released the following statement on an apparent strike on an Iranian girls' school.
    • re challenging armored maneuver.
  • Statement from Assistant Secretary Dylan Johnson on Successful Operations to Assist American Citizens in the Middle East US Dept. of State 09 Mar 2026 -- Over 36,000 American citizens have safely returned to the United States from the Middle East since February 28.
  • US State Department Orders US Diplomats to Leave Saudi Arabia Immediately - Reports Sputnik 09 Mar 2026 -- US diplomats serving in Saudi Arabia have been ordered to leave the country, the New York Times reported citing sources.
  • Trump says Iran's new supreme leader won't "last long" without his approval People's Daily 09 Mar 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump threatened on Sunday that Iran's new supreme leader "is not going to last long" without his approval.
  • Trump administration's Iran strikes spark backlash among MAGA supporters People's Daily 09 Mar 2026 -- In his latest hardline rhetoric, U.S. President Donald Trump said on social media on Friday that the United States will accept no agreement with Iran short of "unconditional surrender," ruling out negotiations.

  • Operation Roaring Lion - Israel MOD Aerial Airlift Expands: 50 Cargo Aircraft Have Landed in Israel Since the Start of the Campaign Israel MOD 09 Mar 2026 -- As part of the procurement and shipping effort in support of the evolving operations in Iran and Lebanon, the Israel Ministry of Defense (IMOD) is reporting the scope of the aerial airlift underway since the launch of the operation: approximately 50 cargo aircraft carrying over 1,000 tons of weaponry, military equipment, and various types of munitions have landed in Israel over the past ten days and have been transferred to the IDF.
  • Israel MOD Accelerates Production of Aerial Munitions to Support the Ongoing Campaign in Iran Israel MOD 09 Mar 2026 -- Israel Ministry of Defense (IMOD) Director General Maj. Gen. (Res.) Amir Baram visited Elbit Systems and conducted a situational assessment with company leadership on scaling up production rates to meet anticipated defense requirements in support of the ongoing campaign in Iran and the potential for its expansion to additional theaters.

  • Iran Sends Message Of 'Defiance' By Picking Mojtaba Khamenei As New Supreme Leader RFE/RL 09 Mar 2026 -- Iran's choice of Mojtaba Khamenei as the country's new supreme leader sends an explicit message to the United States and Israel: External pressure, including decapitation, will harden rather than reshape the Islamic republic's leadership, experts say.
  • Khamenei's son appointed Iran's new supreme leader amid tensions, surging oil prices Global Times 09 Mar 2026 -- Two framed photographs stood on the table - photo of the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on one side and photo of his successor, Mojtaba Khamenei, the late leader's second son, on the other - as Iranian Ambassador to China Abdolreza Rahmani Fazli met the press at the Iranian Embassy in Beijing on Monday.
  • Iran will not target any country not used for aggression: Pezeshkian Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- will refrain from any action against neighboring countries provided their airspace, territory, or waters are not used as platforms for attacks on Iranian soil and people.
  • Top official: Iran ready for a long war with US, no more diplomacy Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- The head of Iran's Strategic Council on Foreign Relations says the United States has proved that it does not know the language of diplomacy, and that Tehran is ready for a long war.
  • Iran has many surprises in store to respond to US plots: FM Araghchi Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says the country is fully prepared to react to malicious plots by the United States aimed at altering the economic equations arising from the ongoing US-Israeli aggression against Iran.
  • Election of new Leader shows will of Iranians for governance: President Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian says the "valuable" election of Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei as new Leader of the Islamic Revolution is a manifestation of the people's will for governance.
  • Iran Names Khamenei's Son As New Supreme Leader Despite Trump Warning RFE/RL 09 Mar 2026 -- Iran has named hard-liner Mojtaba Khamenei to replace his father, the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, as supreme leader, likely putting him directly in the sights of the US and Israeli militaries.
  • Mojtaba Khamenei, son of Ali Khamenei, selected as Iran's new supreme leader People's Daily 09 Mar 2026 -- Mojtaba Khamenei, son of Ali Khamenei, was selected as Iran's new supreme leader, Iran's Assembly of Experts announced on Sunday.
  • Iran reportedly finalizes decision on new supreme leader as US-Israel military operation against Iran enters 9th day Global Times 09 Mar 2026 -- "Weapons are ominous tools, and should not be used without discretion."
  • Profile: Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei, third Leader of the Islamic Revolution Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- By Humaira Ahad
  • Profile: Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei, third Leader of the Islamic Revolution Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- By Humaira Ahad
  • Lawmakers hail appointment of new Leader, pledge allegiance Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- Members of Majlis (the Iranian Parliament) have issued a statement, pledging allegiance to Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei and regarding the new Leader as the most qualified figure capable of filling the capacity.
  • Iran's defense and security institutions unite in steadfast allegiance to new Leader Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- The key pillars of the Islamic Republic of Iran's defense, military, security, and intelligence apparatus have issued steadfast pledges of allegiance to Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei, in a profound display of national cohesion and revolutionary fervor.
  • Supporting anti-Iran aggression constitutes complicity in war: Pezeshkian tells Macron Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian says any involvement by other countries such as France in support of the aggressors will constitute complicity in the US-Israeli "unlawful" war against the Islamic Republic.
  • Triumphant unity: Top Iranian officials rally behind new Leader of Islamic Revolution Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Republic of Iran has witnessed an outpouring of unwavering support from its top officials following the historic election of Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei as the Leader of the Islamic Revolution.
  • President Pezeshkian welcomes Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei's election as new Leader Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian has felicitated Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei following his election as the new Leader of the Islamic Revolution.

  • Statement by UNICEF Regional Director for the Middle East and North Africa, Edouard Beigbeder, on the rise in child casualties amid escalating hostilities in Lebanon UNICEF 09 Mar 2026 -- 83 children killed and 254 injured in the past 7 days, while hundreds of thousands flee their homes

  • China opposes interference in other countries' internal affairs under any pretext, Chinese FM spokesperson comments on US threats toward Iran's new supreme leader Global Times 09 Mar 2026 -- China opposes interference in other countries' internal affairs under any pretext. Iran's sovereignty, security, and territorial integrity should be respected, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Guo Jiakun said
  • This is a decision taken by Iran in line with its national constitution, FM spokesperson responds to Iran's naming of new supreme leader Global Times 09 Mar 2026
  • Chinese FM holds phone talks with Kuwaiti FM, Bahraini counterpart Global Times 09 Mar 2026 -- "China-LAC cooperation has no geopolitical calculations, does not target any third party, and should not be interfered with or affected by any third party," Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Guo Jiakun said at a regular press conference
  • Chinese Middle East envoy talks with GCC chief, Saudi FM in push for de-escalation Global Times 09 Mar 2026 -- China urges all parties to immediately stop military operations, prevent further escalation of tensions and avoid causing greater harm to people in regional countries, said Zhai Jun, the special envoy of the Chinese government on the Middle East issue, when meeting with Saudi Foreign Minister Faisal bin Farhan Al Saud in Saudi Arabia on Sunday. Zhai also met with Jassim Mohammed Al-Budaiwi, secretary-general of the Cooperation Council for the Arab States of the Gulf (GCC) in Riyadh on the same day.

  • Wang Yi Has a Phone Call with Foreign Minister of Kuwait Sheikh Jarrah Jaber Al-Ahmad Al-Sabah PRC MofA 09 Mar 2026

  • Putin congratulates Iran on election of Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei as new Leader Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- Russian President Vladimir Putin has extended his congratulations to Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei over his election as new Leader of the Islamic Revolution.
  • Putin Congratulates Mojtaba Khamenei on His Election as Supreme Leader of Iran Sputnik 09 Mar 2026 -- Russian President Vladimir Putin congratulated on Monday Mojtaba Khamenei on his election as Supreme Leader of Iran.

  • Middle East Update Oral Statement UK MOD 09 Mar 2026 -- Statement to update the House on the Middle East.
  • Turkey - Firing of an Iranian missile at Turkey (9 March 2026) France Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs 09 Mar 2026
  • "Ensuring the tranquility of the 86 million is our greatest sensitivity throughout this process" Presidency of The Republic of Turkey 09 Mar 2026 -- Delivering remarks following the Presidential Cabinet Meeting, President Erdoğan said: "We as the government have been on the alert with all our units since February 28. We have mobilized all the institutions of our state. Our primary aim is to keep our country away from this fire. Ensuring Türkiye's security and the tranquility of the 86 million is our greatest sensitivity throughout this process."
  • Türkiye conveys protest to Iran over ballistic missile that entered Turkish airspace Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 09 Mar 2026 -- Summoning Iran's envoy, the Turkish Foreign Ministry on Monday conveyed Türkiye's protest over a ballistic missile fired from Iran that entered Turkish airspace before it was intercepted, according to Anadolu Agency.
  • Turkish President Erdogan warns against actions that could damage centuries-old ties with Iran Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 09 Mar 2026 -- No step should be taken that would "cast a shadow over our thousand-year neighborly and brotherly ties with Iran or wound our nation," said Türkiye's President Recep Tayyip Erdogan on Monday, referring to the interception of a missile from Iran towards Türkiye earlier in the day, Anadolu Agency reported.
  • Joint statement by President Costa and President von der Leyen after the video conference with Leaders from Middle East countries on the war in Iran EC/CEU 09 Mar 2026 -- Today, President Costa and President von der Leyen exchanged views with the leaders of Jordan, Egypt, Bahrain, Lebanon, Syria, Türkiye, Armenia, Iraq, Qatar, Kuwait, United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia and Oman on the latest developments regarding the war in Iran, including the unacceptable attacks against the countries of the region and the impact on energy security.
  • HE GCCSG Participates in Joint Summit Between the EU, Representatives of GCC Leaders, and Leaders of Egypt, Jordan, Iraq, Syria, Lebanon, Turkey, Azerbaijan, and Armenia to Discuss Treacherous Iranian Aggressions Gulf Cooperation Council 09 Mar 2026
  • Statement on attacks against Gulf Cooperation Council countries and Türkiye Spain MFA 09 Mar 2026 -- The Spanish Government extends its deepest condolences to the families of the victims who died in the unjustified and indiscriminate attacks against our partners in the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC)
  • Japan-Iran Foreign Ministers' Telephone Call Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 09 Mar 2026
  • PH Embassy Statement on Recent Missile Attacks on the United Arab Emirates Philippines DFA 09 Mar 2026 -- The Philippine Government stands in solidarity with the UAE following the recent missile attacks on its territory, which constitute a serious violation of the country's sovereignty and a threat to regional peace and stability.
  • Bahrain's Bapco Energies declares force majeure over Iranian attacks Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 09 Mar 2026 -- Bahrain's Bapco Energies on Monday announced a state of force majeure on its group's operations affected by the ongoing Iranian attacks, according to Anadolu Agency.
  • President of the Republic of Cyprus: Cyprus is not involved in military operations in any way Republic of Cyprus 09 Mar 2026 -- President Christodoulides welcomed the Prime Minister of the Hellenic Republic shortly after midday at the air base and, shortly afterwards, the President of the Republic of France.
  • Outcome of ROK-Qatar Foreign Ministers' Telephone Conversation (March 9) ROK MFA 09 Mar 2026

  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Three Drones Heading Toward Shaybah Field Intercepted and Destroyed in the Empty Quarter SPA 09 Mar 2026
  • Saudi Arabia Affirms Right to Defend Its Security Against Iranian Attacks, Warns Iran of Greatest Loss in Wider Escalation SPA 09 Mar 2026 -- The Ministry of Foreign Affairs issued a statement reiterating the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia's firm condemnation of the Iranian attacks against Saudi Arabia and the member states of the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC), as well as a number of Arab, Islamic, and friendly countries, which cannot be accepted or justified under any circumstances. The Kingdom affirms that it retains its full right to take all necessary measures to safeguard its security, sovereignty, and the safety of its citizens and residents, and deter aggression
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Drone Intercepted, Destroyed in Empty Quarter Heading toward Shaybah Field SPA 09 Mar 2026

  • Resistance groups congratulate Iran on Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei's election as new Leader Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- Regional resistance movements have issued separate statements congratulating the Islamic Republic of Iran on the election of Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei as the new Leader of the Islamic Revolution.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • JIATF 401 Publishes Guide to Counter-Drone Technology and Privacy Protections DoD 09 Mar 2026 -- The Joint Interagency Task Force 401 today announced the publication of "Counter-UAS Operations: Safeguarding Freedoms and Preserving Privacy," a comprehensive guide to the sensor technologies used to detect and identify drone threats and the legal framework that governs their use.
  • Air Force, MASS-TF sign MOU to evaluate strategic real estate opportunities US Air Force 09 Mar 2026 -- The Department of the Air Force and the Commonwealth of Massachusetts Military Asset and Security Strategy Task Force signed a memorandum of understanding to explore mutually beneficial opportunities at Hanscom Air Force Base, March 5.
  • U.S. Coast Guard authenticates keels for first three Waterways Commerce Cutters US Coast Guard 09 Mar 2026 -- The U.S. Coast Guard authenticated the keels for future Coast Guard cutters Allen Thiele, Fred Permenter and Samuel Wilson on Friday in Bayou La Batre, Alabama.
  • USS Nimitz Conducts Milestone Departure from Naval Base Kitsap US Navy 09 Mar 2026 -- The Nimitz-class aircraft carrier USS Nimitz (CVN 68) departed Naval Base Kitsap in Bremerton, Washington, for the last time in its 51-year service history, as part of a scheduled homeport shift to Naval Station Norfolk, Virginia, March 7.
  • Navy Kicks Off Operation Ice Camp 2026 in the Arctic Ocean US Navy 09 Mar 2026 -- Commander, Submarine Forces officially kicked off Operation Ice Camp (ICE CAMP) Boarfish in the Arctic Ocean on March 7, 2026, after the building of the camp and the arrival of two U.S. Navy fast attack submarines, USS Delaware (SSN 791) and USS Santa Fe (SSN 763).
  • U.S. and U.K Army leaders discuss shared challenges of armored warfare Army News 09 Mar 2026 -- U.S. Army and allied leaders are wrestling with how to win on battlefields of new technologies that a
  • Australia, India, Japan, New Zealand, U.S. kick off anti-submarine warfare exercise Sea Dragon 2026 U.S. 7th Fleet 09 Mar 2026 -- Two U.S. Navy P-8A Poseidon aircraft, one each from Patrol Squadron (VP) 4 and VP-45, were joined by one P-8I from the Indian Navy (IN), one P-1 from the Japan Maritime Self-Defense Force (JMSDF), two P-8A from the Royal Australian Air Force (RAAF), and one P-8A from the Royal New Zealand Air Force (RNZAF) for the start of multinational exercise Sea Dragon 2026 at Andersen Air Force Base, March 9.
  • JTF-Bravo Aircraft Support U.S.-Panama Effort to Strengthen Regional Security in Jungle Training SOUTHCOM 09 Mar 2026 -- Two U.S. Army HH-60 and one UH-60 Black Hawk helicopters assigned to the 1st Battalion 228th Aviation Regiment, Joint Task Force-Bravo, depart Soto Cano Air Base, Honduras, March 8, 2026
  • US, South Korea launch key springtime military drill Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 09 Mar 2026 -- The US and South Korea launched a major annual joint springtime military exercise Monday, with the number of planned field training drills cut sharply compared with last year, local media reported.

  • Arctic Sentry enhances Allied cold-weather operations preparedness through Exercise Cold Response 2026 NATO Allied Joint Force Command (JFC) Norfolk 09 Mar 2026 -- Cold Response 2026 (CORE 26), which starts today and runs to March 20, 2026, is a clear demonstration of NATO's presence and posture in the High North and Arctic, under the Arctic Sentry framework.
  • Investment Committee approves first NATO Maritime Science and Technology Project proposal NATO Support and Procurement Agency (NSPA) 09 Mar 2026 -- On 17 February, the first project proposal within NSPA's NATO Maritime Science and Technology capability was approved by the NATO Investment Committee (IC), representing a key milestone between the NATO Support and Procurement Agency (NSPA) and the Centre for Maritime Research and Experimentation (CMRE) - located in La Spezia, Italy.
  • Data on interceptions of aircraft completed near the Baltic States' borders on March 2 - 8, 2026 Lithuania MND 09 Mar 2026

  • Independent assessment confirms DELTA remains compliant with all cybersecurity standards after scaling Ukraine MOD 09 Mar 2026
  • Netherlands, Ukraine agree to expand cooperation in defense, drone production Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 09 Mar 2026 -- The Netherlands and Ukraine on Sunday agreed to expand cooperation in defense and drone production, Anadolu Agency reported.
  • Prime Minister Andrey Gurov reiterates Bulgaria's support for Ukraine at today's Coalition of the Willing meeting Council of Ministers of the Republic of Bulgaria 09 Mar 2026 -- Prime Minister Andrey Gurov attended a videoconference of the leaders from the Coalition of the Willing.

  • Minister Sidhu welcomes $39 million Canadian contract with Portuguese Air Force to modernize aircraft Canada 09 Mar 2026 -- The Honourable Maninder Sidhu, Minister of International Trade, today welcomed the signature of the Canadian Commercial Corporation's (CCC) $39 million government-to-government (G2G) contract with the Portuguese Air Force to modernize five additional P-3C Orion aircraft.

  • Ministry of Defence releases Manual of Security Instructions 2026 India PIB 09 Mar 2026 -- Defence Secretary Shri Rajesh Kumar Singh released a new Manual of Security Instructions 2026 of the Ministry of Defence at a function in South Block, New Delhi on March 09, 2026
  • INDIAN CONTINGENT DEPARTS FOR SEYCHELLES FOR JOINT MILITARY "EXERCISE LAMITIYE - 2026" India PIB 09 Mar 2026 -- Indian Armed Forces contingent arrived at Seychelles to participate in the Eleventh edition of Joint Military Exercise "LAMITIYE-2026" with Seychelles Defence Forces (SDF)

  • SIPRI report shows Japan's arms imports up 76% in five years; expert says report turns blind eye to resurgence of Japanese militarism Global Times 09 Mar 2026 -- The latest report released by the Stockholm International Peace Research Institute (SIPRI) on Monday showed that in East Asia, Japan has seen a significant increase in arms imports, while China has dropped out of the top ten arms importers for the first time since 1995. Additionally, the report turned a blind eye to the threat posed by the resurgence of Japanese militarism to regional and global peace and stability, routinely hyping the so-called "China threat" narrative.

  • Excercise Heimdall Forsvaret - Norwegian Armed Forces 09 Mar 2026 -- From 9-26 February 2026, the NATO Centre of Excellence Cold Weather Operations (COE-CWO) initiated and facilitated Exercise Heimdall in the Northern part of Norway

  • More AMRAAM and Spike LR2 missiles arrived to Lithuanian Armed Forces warehouses Lithuania MND 09 Mar 2026 -- The Lithuanian Armed Forces has added over EUR 5.7 million worth of AMRAAM 120B and SPIKE LR2 missiles, and 5,56×45 mm NATO BALL ammunition to its arsenal.

  • Minister of Defence Antti Häkkänen: A NATO Deployable CIS Module will be established in Riihimäki Finnish MoD 09 Mar 2026 -- Finland's Minister of Defence Antti Häkkänen decided on 6th of March 2026 that a NATO Deployable CIS Module (DMC) will be established in Riihimäki. The DMC is scheduled to start operations in early 2027.
  • Functions of 3rd Logistics Regiment to be placed in Kemi Finnish MoD 09 Mar 2026 -- Finland's Minister of Defence Antti Häkkänen has decided to place functions of the 3rd Logistics Regiment of the Finnish Defence Forces Logistics Command in Kemi.

  • Generators from Japan to boost PCG's patrol vessel operations Philippine News Agency 09 Mar 2026 -- The government of Japan has turned over 13 generators with trailers to the Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) to help enhance the country's maritime law enforcement capabilities.
  • PH Navy deployment to 'Kakadu' shows strong ties with Australia Philippine News Agency 09 Mar 2026 -- The Philippine Navy's (PN) deployment of its most modern guided missile frigate, the BRP Diego Silang (FFG-7), to this year's iteration of the Multilateral Naval Exercise "Kakadu" in Australia showcased the growing defense ties of the two nations.

  • Shaheen, Warren, Whitehouse, Kim, Durbin and Colleagues Introduce Legislation to Reinforce Foreign Corrupt Practices Act, Countering Trump's Narrowed Enforcement of Landmark Anti-Bribery Law US Senate Foreign Relations Committee 09 Mar 2026 -- Today, U.S. Senators Jeanne Shaheen (D-NH), Ranking Member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, Elizabeth Warren (D-MA), Ranking Member of the Senate Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs Committee; Sheldon Whitehouse (D-RI), Co-Chair of the Caucus on International Narcotics Control; Andy Kim (D-NJ), Ranking Member of the National Security and International Trade and Finance Subcommittee; and Dick Durbin (D-IL), Ranking Member of the Judiciary Committee led their colleagues in introducing The FCPA Reinforcement Act to strengthen enforcement of the Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) of 1977.
  • Risch Statement on Hostage and Wrongful Detainee Day US Senate Foreign Relations Committee 09 Mar 2026 -- U.S. Senator Jim Risch (R-Idaho), chairman of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, today released the statement below to commemorate U.S. Hostage and Wrongful Detainee Day.

  • Hezbollah launches rocket attack on Israeli soldiers near Lebanon border Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- Lebanon's Hezbollah resistance movement says it has targeted Israeli soldiers near the border with a rocket attack.‌

  • Nearly 700,000 displaced in Lebanon as Middle East crisis escalates UN News 09 Mar 2026 -- On day 10 of the war engulfing the Middle East, UN agencies on Monday reported massive displacement across the region, along with surging food and fuel prices that risk increasing hunger and suffering for the most vulnerable.

  • Lebanon: Statement by the High Representative on the recent developments European External Action Service (EEAS) 09 Mar 2026 -- Lebanon risks becoming another front in the war with Iran. Hezbollah's decision to attack Israel in support of Iran endangers the entire region and adds a deadly dimension.

    • Other Conflicts

  • Today's top news: Middle East, Lebanon, Occupied Palestinian Territory, South Sudan, Sudan UNOCHA 09 Mar 2026

  • Women and Girls Represent Nearly Half of Global Displacement as Shelter Gaps Persist IOM 09 Mar 2026 -- As the world marks International Women's Day, the International Organization for Migration (IOM) warns that millions of displaced and migrant women and girls remain without access to safe and adequate shelter, exposing them to heightened risks of violence, exploitation and exclusion from essential services. IOM calls on governments and partners to scale up investment in gender-responsive shelter solutions that protect rights, safety and dignity.

  • Humanitarian crisis 'worsening' in Afghanistan as war erupts in the Middle East UN News 09 Mar 2026 -- Crises in the region on both Afghanistan's longest borders are undermining the country's stability, a senior UN official warned the Security Council on Monday as concerns over Middle East crisis grow amid clashes with Pakistan and a worsening humanitarian crisis.
  • Restrictions on Women, International Isolation Hindering Afghanistan's Progress, Deputy Mission Head Tells Security Council UN Security Council 09 Mar 2026 -- The Taliban's good-faith engagement with the international community, coupled with the prompt lifting of deeply harmful restrictions on women and girls, are crucial for Afghanistan to succeed as a country and society, the UN's Deputy Head of Mission there told the Security Council today.
  • Afghanistan Designated as a State Sponsor of Wrongful Detention US Dept. of State 09 Mar 2026
  • We are appalled by the continued restrictions imposed on the women and girls of Afghanistan: UK statement at the UN Security Council UK FCDO 09 Mar 2026 -- Statement by The Rt Hon Baroness Smith of Malvern, Minister of State (Minister for Skills) and Minister of State (Minister for Women and Equalities) at the UN Security Council meeting on Afghanistan.

  • IRGC dismantles anti-Iran armed terrorist group in Kordestan Press TV 09 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has dismantled an armed terrorist group in the Iranian province of Kordestan, eliminating one of its members and arresting six others, amid American attempts to create chaos in the Islamic Republic.

  • Türkiye deploys 6 F-16s, air defense systems to Northern Cyprus Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 09 Mar 2026 -- Türkiye announced Monday that six fighter jets and air defense systems have been deployed to the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus (TRNC) as part of efforts to strengthen the territory's security amid regional tensions, according to Anadolu Agency.

  • Statement attributable to the Spokesperson for the Secretary-General - on Colombia UN Secretary-General 09 Mar 2026

News Reports

  • The Swedish Coast Guard remains at Caffa Swedish Coast Guard 09 Mar 2026 -- Caffa is still anchored outside Trelleborg, at the south coast of Sweden. The Swedish Coast Guard crew on KBV 034 is available to act on the prosecutor's directives in the ongoing preliminary investigation.

  • 'Insider Threat Program' still at work vs. espionage threats Philippine News Agency 09 Mar 2026 -- Despite the neutralization of an alleged espionage ring, a ranking military official said the government's "Insider Threat Program" will continue with its task of protecting sensitive information.

  • Russia targets Signal and WhatsApp accounts in cyber campaign Netherlands Ministry of Defence 09 Mar 2026

  • Two ISIS Supporters Charged with Attempting to Detonate Explosive Devices During Protests Outside Gracie Mansion US Dept. of Justice 09 Mar 2026 -- Today, the Department of Justice announced charges against Emir Balat and Ibrahim Kayumi alleging that they attempted to detonate two explosive devices in the vicinity of Gracie Mansion, and that they were acting in support of ISIS, a designated foreign terrorist organization.

  • Terrorist Designation of the Sudanese Muslim Brotherhood US Dept. of State 09 Mar 2026 -- Today, the Department of State is designating the Sudanese Muslim Brotherhood as a Specially Designated Global Terrorist and intends to designate the group as a Foreign Terrorist Organization, effective March 16, 2026.
  • Designation of the Sudanese Muslim Brotherhood US Dept. of State 09 Mar 2026 -- Today, the Department of State announces the designation of the Sudanese Muslim Brotherhood as a Specially Designated Global Terrorist and the intent to designate the group as a Foreign Terrorist Organization.

  • Remarks by Director Carter at the United Nations' Commission on Narcotic Drugs The White House 09 Mar 2026

  • Meeting on the situation in the global oil and gas market President of Russia 09 Mar 2026 -- Vladimir Putin held a meeting on the situation in the global oil and gas market.
  • Putin: Destabilizing Middle East Risks Global Energy Shock and Higher Oil and Gas Prices Sputnik 09 Mar 2026 -- Attempts to destabilize the Middle East would put the global fuel and energy sector at risk and drive up oil and gas prices, Russian President Vladimir Putin said.
  • Putin, Trump Hold 1-Hour Phone Talk to Discuss Current Global Issues - Kremlin Aide Sputnik 09 Mar 2026 -- Russian President Vladimir Putin and US President Donald Trump have held an hour-long telephone conversation at the initiative of the United States to discuss current developments in the international arena, Kremlin aide Yury Ushakov said on Monday.

  • China's national legislature holds second plenary meeting People's Daily 09 Mar 2026 -- The fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress (NPC), China's top legislature, held its second plenary meeting on Monday.
  • Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Guo Jiakun's Regular Press Conference on March 9, 2026 PRC MofA 09 Mar 2026
  • LAC countries have the right to independently choose co-op partners: FM on Trump's claim of foreign forces' foothold in Western Hemisphere Global Times 09 Mar 2026 -- "China-LAC cooperation has no geopolitical calculations, does not target any third party, and should not be interfered with or affected by any third party," Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Guo Jiakun said at a regular press conference on Monday, when asked how China will protect its partnerships in Latin America, as well as its assets and investments in the region as US President Donald Trump claimed that the US would not allow hostile foreign forces to gain a foothold in the Western Hemisphere, including in the Panama Canal, following his meeting with more than a dozen Latin American and Caribbean leaders last week, though he didn't mention China specifically.
  • Chinese FM addresses 21 questions, pitches China's diplomatic vision in era of uncertainty Global Times 09 Mar 2026 -- In roughly 90 minutes, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi on Sunday addressed 21 questions ranging from China's relations with major countries of Russia and the US, to the situation in Iran and the China-Japan ties...In front of this barrage of challenging and complex questions, Wang, drawing on traditional Chinese classics and metaphors, faced them head-on and pitched China's diplomatic vision.
  • China reiterates support for peace, multipolarity as new conflicts flare People's Daily 09 Mar 2026 -- China's top diplomat on Sunday reaffirmed the country's role as a vital force for world peace, stability and justice, calling for an immediate ceasefire in the Middle East and proposing that China and the United States focus on win-win cooperation.

  • Mainland spokesperson slams Taiwan official's Japan trip as 'despicable'; FM warns Japan against emboldening provocation Global Times 09 Mar 2026 -- Spokespersons of Chinese Foreign Ministry and the Taiwan Affairs Office of the State Council on Monday condemned the recent visit to Japan by Cho Jung-tai, chief of Taiwan's executive body, as a move aimed at seeking "Taiwan independence," which is despicable.
  • Chinese FM slams Taiwan island 'executive body' head's Japan trip as 'clandestine,' warns Japan for conniving provocation Global Times 09 Mar 2026 -- When asked to comment on Cho Jung-tai, head of the Taiwan island's "executive body," traveling to Japan to watch a baseball game and claiming that the trip was private with no official arrangements, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Guo Jiakun said on Monday that "the person you mentioned harbors sinister intentions," adding that Cho sneaked to Japan in a furtive and clandestine manner to pursue petty and provocative moves seeking "Taiwan independence." Such despicable deeds and schemes are utterly contemptible, Guo said.
  • Washington urges Taiwan lawmakers to pass special defense budget bill CNA 09 Mar 2026 -- The United States government on Sunday called on Taiwanese lawmakers across party lines to pass a special defense budget bill that would finance Taiwan's planned purchases of American weapon systems for self-defense.
  • China severely punishes "Taiwan independence" separatists People's Daily 09 Mar 2026 -- China severely punished diehard separatists seeking "Taiwan independence" in 2025 in an effort to safeguard national security, the Supreme People's Court said Monday in its work report.
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 09 Mar 2026

  • Comrade Kim Jong Un's Speech in Congratulation of Women across Country on Occasion of March 8 International Women's Day KCNA 09 Mar 2026 -- The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un made a speech in congratulation of the women across the country on the occasion of the March 8 International Women's Day.

  • Keynote speech by HR/VP Kaja Kallas at the 2026 EU Ambassadors Conference European External Action Service (EEAS) 09 Mar 2026 -- Dear Ambassadors,
  • Speech by President von der Leyen at the EU Ambassadors Conference 2026 European Commission 09 Mar 2026

  • World News in Brief: Myanmar airstrikes worsen crisis, South Sudan fighting threatens Akobo, Afghan women shut out of justice UN News 09 Mar 2026 -- Conflict continues to fuel suffering and drive humanitarian needs in Myanmar, the UN relief coordination office, OCHA, said in a bulletin on Monday.
